/CAL:BENCH WARRANT RETURN/TEXT: DEFT WAIVES INST AND ARRAIGNMENT NL PLEA/PD/BWDNC/BFSA:01-26-16/BE/X:COURT NOTES THE FIRST AMENDED MISDEMEANOR COMPLAINT CHARGES PC 148,9(A) AS COUNT 1 BUT IS REFLECTED AS COUNT 4 ON THE DOCKET IN ERROR,/X:AS SUCH, AMENDMENT IS MADE TO CONFORM WITH THE FILED COMPLAINT,/FAWC/DEFT ADV ANNL:001/NOLO/DISM3/
